name: Aroa Le Naturel Zero Zero Blanco Alcohol Free
description: Compatibility The wine will perfectly complement the taste of white meat, seafood, sushi, shellfish, sea bass carpaccio, light pasta dishes, dairy cheeses and fresh vegetables. Color The wine is straw-golden in color with light greenish highlights. Scent The refreshing, harmonious aroma of the wine reveals shades of apricot, peach, apple, pear, melon and white flowers. Taste The wine demonstrates a soft, clean taste with fruity-mineral shades and a pleasant sourness in the aftertaste.

name: Pierre Chavin Le Petit Chavin Rose (Alcohol free)
description: Compatibility Pairs perfectly with light snacks, fruit salads, grilled fish and Mediterranean cuisine. Color Delicate, light pink with a slight pearlescent hue. Scent A fresh bouquet with notes of strawberry, raspberry, red currant and light floral accents. Taste Soft and harmonious, with a fruity base and a slight sourness that gives the wine freshness.

name: Divin Vigneron Pinot Noir Alcohol Free 2023
description: Compatibility This wine pairs well with desserts, especially strawberry pie, and can also be served as an aperitif or with light dishes. Color The wine is a clear ruby ​​red with violet reflections. Scent The wine has an expressive aroma of red fruits such as red currant, strawberry, cherry and blackcurrant, complemented by fresh notes of genepi, mint and tomato leaf. The bouquet is completed by subtle shades of caramel and vanilla. Taste On the palate, the wine shows a medium structure with refreshing acidity and well-integrated tannins. Fruity and floral notes present in the aroma continue on the palate, creating a balanced and harmonious profile.

name: Bergdolt-Reif & Nett Reverse Riesling Alcohol Free 2024
description: Compatibility It also goes well with fish, seafood and light snacks. Color The color of the wine is pale yellow, which gives it a special sophistication. Scent The aroma of the drink is filled with floral and fruity notes that reveal themselves with every sip. Taste It has a fresh and fruity taste with notes of citrus and ripe apples.

name: Casa Emma Zeero Sangiovese Alcohol Free
description: Compatibility Wine perfectly complements meat dishes: roast lamb, steak and chips, spicy meatballs, as well as lasagna, pasta, blue and mature cheeses. Color Garnet red color. Scent The aroma varies, but most give off notes of vanilla, forest leaves, wild berries, and anise. Over time, you may notice the figs, roses and dried cherry scents, particularly if it is an older blend. A chalky undergrowth scent is common in Chianti Riserva and Brunello. Taste Varietal Sangiovese offers primary flavors of tart cherry, red plum, strawberry, and fig, with subtle notes of roasted pepper, tomato, leather, clay, brick, tobacco, smoke, oregano, thyme, dried roses, or potpourri.

name: Chateau Clos de Bouard Prince Oscar Alcohol Free 2022
description: Compatibility This non-alcoholic wine is suitable for any special occasions and evenings with friends. Color The wine has a rich dark red color. Scent The aroma has hints of strawberry and lightly cooked plums. Taste The taste has a pleasant duration. Long aftertaste with a soft attack of red fruits, lots of sweetness and sophistication. Spicy aftertaste.

name: Casa Emma Zeero Rose Alcohol Free
description: Compatibility Pairs well with salads, fruits, tapas, cheese and light Mediterranean dishes. Color Light pink with salmon tones. Scent Bright notes of strawberry, cherry, rose petals and light citrus. Taste Fresh, fruity, with delicate acidity and a soft berry aftertaste.
